changeSet.author: systemLevelAudit
changeSet.comment: Add Audit Trail as top-level Reports sub-menu (sibling of Routine/Study)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.menu (id, parent_id, presentation_order, element_id, action_url, display_key, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.menu_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports'), 3, 'menu_reports_audittrail', '/AuditTrailReports', 'sideNav.title.audittrail', true WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_audittrail');

changeSet.author: systemLevelAudit
changeSet.comment: Deactivate old audit trail entries nested under Routine and Study

changeSet.author: systemLevelAudit
changeSet.comment: Add System Events and Order Events as child menu items under Audit Trail folder

changeSet.author: systemLevelAudit
changeSet.comment: Add indexes to support system audit event queries (filter/sort by timestamp, reference_table, sys_user_id)
